news.paragraph: Recent headlines indicate that gold prices are facing downward pressure, influenced by rising Treasury yields and comments from former President Trump. Despite some easing in yields and a steady dollar, gold has continued to trade lower, with prices reaching multi-week lows. Traders should consider the impact of macroeconomic factors like inflation worries and geopolitical events, as well as the ongoing debate comparing gold to S&P 500 investments.

headlines.title: Treasury Yields Spike To Trump's Second-Term High, Sinking Gold And S&P 500
